Yoksulluğa da girmek istiyordum ama herhâlde vakit ona çok elverişli olmayacak.
Son bir şey söyleyeceğim: Şimdi, ithamlar, eleştiriler çok yoğun. Tabii, hepimizi bire bir de ilgilendiren alanlar, bunların hepsi, her biri oluyor. Şimdi, muhalefetin ne kadar doğru bilgilendirildiğiyle ilgili de Bakanlık çalışanları, bu konunun muhatapları bence bir öz eleştiri yapmalı çünkü biz 28'inci dönemde 11 Kasım 2025 itibarıyla 1.373 soru önergesi vermişiz ve bunlardan sadece 155'i yani yüzde 11,2'si süresi içinde, yüzde 67'si de süresi geçtikten sonra cevaplanmış, yüzde 18,7'si hiç cevaplanmamış. Şimdi, bizim eleştirilerimizin hakkaniyetli, bizim eleştirilerimizin gerçeğe uygun olabilmesi için elimizde gerçek verilerin olması gerekiyor yani siz bizi bilgilendireceksiniz, öğrenmek istediklerimizi bize vereceksiniz ki biz de sizin Parlamentodan beklediğiniz hakkaniyetli eleştiri zemininde o zaman yükseltelim eleştirileri. Dolayısıyla, bu soru önergeleri konusunda hassasiyet rica ediyorum.
Teşekkür ediyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Dear Minister, Deputy Ministers, valuable Ministry bureaucrats; We are together on a day of mourning. First of all, I wish God's mercy on our martyrs, and I wish patience to the entire Turkish nation, especially their families. From one end of Türkiye to the other, both in Tekirdağ, where I am the deputy, and in our neighboring province, Kırklareli, but as I said, in these hours when the hearths are burning all over Türkiye, mothers, fathers, spouses and children are burning with a fire that will never go out, and many of the families we will talk about today are actually shaken to their foundations and perhaps their pillars are collapsing, I think it is up to each of us, each of us, to maintain dignity at least today.
Before making an assessment of the overall budget, in line with both the spirit of the day and our shared feelings, I would like to start with our martyrs' relatives and veterans. At first glance, there seems to be a significant increase of 44 percent in the share allocated from the ministry budget for relatives of martyrs and veterans, but last year the rate of this increase was 67 percent. I personally cannot accept that the share allocated for the relatives of martyrs and veterans, to whom we say we owe everything at every opportunity, amounts to 0.03 percent of the budget, so this should not be the equivalent of our debt of life. We owe a state debt, a flag, a national debt to them, and this amount is almost nothing. Yes, I actually looked at the performance indicators, that is, the rate of realization of the Ministry's targets regarding the relatives of martyrs and our veterans is 100 percent, I see this, but what does that 100 percent mean? Maybe we should look at this. By the way, I know that you have not turned down any request from the relatives of any martyrs or veterans, I see, I observe, I know that it is the same outside the budget framework, but I think that the duty of the Turkish state - not only of this Ministry - is to bring up to a standard that will not have to open hands at the door of the children who lost their lives, lost their arms, legs, eyes, ears, and those who are entrusted to them for the eternal existence of the state. In other words, not even one martyr's family should be in need, not even one martyr's family should be unable to meet their needs, and we should not hear that even one martyr's family's house has been seized, for example; These people should not have to demand any support or assistance from us so that we can talk about 100 percent success in general.
Now, in 2026-2027-2028, the number of people benefiting here is decreasing at this rate, I wonder why. There is a difference between July 15 veterans, counter-terrorism veterans and combat veterans, you know there is a difference. These differences need to be eliminated, starting from the process of obtaining the title of veteran. That is, it does not suit us to categorize martyrs and veterans. In our martyrs' families, we give one child the right to be employed, and we force them to choose a child. In fact, we say that we should grant these rights to all the children of our martyrs. Likewise, our disabled veterans and combat veterans also have similar employment demands regarding their children.

Another demand is to expand the employment priority for these families by adding articles 53 of the Civil Servants Law and article 30 of the Labor Law. One hundred and twenty months of rental support is provided to high-ranking personnel and police officers who have been martyred and veterans in the fight against terrorism and have the right to housing. I would like to convey that this support should be given regardless of rank and class, and that it should also include veterans in need. And in the fight against terrorism
We have heroes who are not considered veterans even though they are injured, that is, they still carry bullets from which shrapnel fragments cannot be removed, and therefore they experience many health problems, especially heavy metal poisoning. In total, we have 23 thousand people, that is, 23 thousand children. If the title of veteran can now be granted with a decree regardless of the degree of injury for July 15, I think it is not very difficult or difficult to give these sons of the country their rights. It shouldn't be too much to send them off on their last journey with a flag wrapped in a star and crescent. In fact, they want to leave a title and a medal to these people and their children, as a memory of their struggle.
Many articles of support and solidarity for the relatives of martyrs and our veterans can be discussed here, but these days, especially in this conjuncture we are in, I think the most basic need of both our martyrs' families and veterans is to feel that they do not die so that the murderers of their children can be applauded under this roof. You know, they say, "The families of the martyrs are also satisfied, but look, they do not raise their voices." You are also a mother, Mr. Minister, and I am a mother too; Which mother's heart would accept applause for the murderer of her child, and moreover, for her child to be applauded under this blessed roof that she died for and established the republic? It's not that these people don't have a voice, their voices are being silenced; Now we need to agree here. They are threatened with that one position given to their other children; Martyr families are threatened with the sustenance of their martyrs' children. Families of martyrs are threatened with taking back their children's martyrdom title. I mean, there are examples that I know one by one, name by name. On behalf of all the families of the martyrs, I ask you to take the initiative and step in to end this disgrace. A martyr's family should have the right to tell each of us anything; None of us should be offended by this, I mean they should have the right to be angry, they should also have the right to be angry, they should also have the right to be held accountable. None of us should or should have the right to take away a mother's right to cry out when her child's memory is violated. We do not have this authority anyway. Therefore, it is not the families of the martyrs that the state should silence, but the murderers of our martyrs, and those who praise those murderers even under this roof and give them the courage to do so.
Now, when it comes to the overall budget, you started your presentation last year as follows: "We are working to build a better future for all our citizens, especially women, children, disabled and elderly people all over our country.

"A better future is, yes, a construction goal, but we cannot achieve this by trying to protect women, by trying to protect children, by trying to protect the elderly, by trying to feed the hungry, by trying to warm the cold. Because these can only be repair activities, not construction. We can reach a better, safer, more prosperous future not by actually protecting women, children, the elderly, the disabled, but by establishing a society, climate, and ground where they will not need protection, and this, if you want, multiply this budget by 10, only this Ministry can do it alone." According to the Minister, an unchanging national education policy is needed for this, ignorance is the source of most of the wounds you are trying to heal. If we have to protect the child from his family, his mother, his father, it is actually a corruption. We need the rule of law, justice and social justice. You cannot prevent any crime if impunity is established in a country. An economic transformation is needed, eliminating family relations, decreasing tolerance, outbursts of anger, chronic despair and helplessness; while the destruction of Türkiye in all other areas is a reality, you can of course do it individually, with the help of your own Ministry, but unfortunately you do not have the opportunity to build a good future on a social scale. You can only dress the wounds of a society that has not built a good future. Yes, you can relieve it, but none of the wounds will heal; unless the causes of this poverty, violence, abuse, inequality, hunger and openness are eliminated, the consequences are bound to get worse with each passing year and turn into an unbearable burden, and unfortunately, Mr. Minister, you, your bureaucrats and we as a society will all fall under this burden at the end of the day.
In a climate where almost half of the employees are equal to the minimum wage and the minimum wage is below the hunger line - that is, not the poverty line, but the hunger line - with what social assistance can we end poverty, especially with this budget? Your budget share, which was 3.77 in 2022, decreased to 3.35 in 2023, to 3 in 2024, to 2.76 in 2025, and now 2.81 percent of the central government budget for 2026; 531 billion 905 million 396 thousand liras. Now, I said the same thing last year; In order to achieve these goals with this share, this amount, one has to be a magician. There is a 37.9 percent increase in your personnel expenses. If this is about increasing the quality of service and field personnel, it is very positive and worth supporting, but unfortunately, it will not reach the targets if it is only due to wage and salary increases. Because the Ministry has a serious need to increase the number of professional staff; This is our observation from the outside.

There is a situation that caught my attention, from the case of a child sleeping on the street in Batman to the child who was subjected to violence in the nursery in Diyarbakır, from those correspondences in the children's home in Karaman to the child who was subjected to violence by his grandmother in Izmir, yes, the Ministry intervenes as soon as it learns about these. By the way, the issues he learned from us are the same for all political parties. When our friends forward them, they are followed up and we receive their feedback, thank you for that. We see that this whole learning process, all this scandal, violence, abuse, learning process, is mostly from the press or social media. Now, then, we have the idea that there is a weakness in the Ministry's own monitoring mechanisms or a weakness in internal control.
Again, the share of goods and services expenses in the budget is 5 percent. We wonder if this share is sufficient for maintenance, technical support, cleaning and security of social service centers. Likewise, the share of current transfers in the budget is 77.81 percent, but since it includes social aid, that is, considering the loss of income in this inflationary environment, an increase of 29.48 percent from last year to this year seems to be just a cost update rather than expanding its scope. Again, the share of capital expenses is 1.9 percent. Does this mean that the Ministry has no plans to build a new social service centre, shelter, nursing home or children's home? There is a need for all this, but it is obvious that it is not possible to do it with this share.
If I say "family" now, you will say Family and Youth Fund; If I say "peer bullying", WE Project; here is "Children go to school hungry." I will say, you will explain the School Support Project; If I complain about digital threats, DUY Reporting Platform, you just said, if I say "drugs", you will say "Children are Safe" about the streets; If I say "femicides" - it's been talked about a lot, so I won't go into it much - you will give examples from Law No. 6284 on the Protection of the Family and Prevention of Violence Against Women, and explain the National Action Plan for Combating Violence Against Women. Now, there is a handicap: All the topics that we actually complain about or bring here as problems have an equivalent on paper, let's not say that they do not exist here, they have an equivalent on paper, they are not bad or good, but the actual situation cannot be achieved; There is a problem that we cannot overcome in practice. A very serious evaluation needs to be made regarding why it has not been overcome.
The Investigation Commission on Violence Against Women was established, you came too, our other ministers also came. Let me give an example from there, for example, we went to the Ministry of Internal Affairs, the chief who gave the briefing said that the main reason for these cases of violence against women and femicide was economic problems. Likewise, the Minister of Justice had come the day before, and the data of the Minister of Justice said that the main reason was economic, that is, it was based on economic problems, but the Minister of Internal Affairs insisted to us: "No, it has nothing to do with it. A lot of alcohol is already consumed in Russia and in Türkiye; the main reason is alcohol." he said.

Now the data is out there, the Ministry's data, the Ministry's own data is out there, so how will this work happen if we make even the data fall into disarray according to our ideology? I'm really having a hard time understanding it.
Now, everything talked about here today has a causal link with economic problems; We need to stop denying this. Poverty, which is getting deeper every moment, affects family relationships, reduces psychological endurance and tolerance, and also affects child development. We complain that the marriage rate has decreased, that is, it was 8.35 in 2001; 6.65 in 2024. They cannot get married in this economic environment, so
I went over the wedding expenses and all, but they gave up on the wedding and the association; Well, we are at the top of the world in terms of rent increase. Let's say they got married, even if they got married, they wouldn't be able to maintain that marriage, as a matter of fact, they can't, so we have jumped to the highest level in the divorce rate with 2.19 per thousand in 2024. Now, yes, let's protect the family institution, that is, the family is the basic core, the castle of society, I agree completely, let's protect it, but we cannot protect the family institution under a roof where the rent has not been paid, under a roof where the bills have not been paid, under a roof where the father cannot buy his child's notebook or pen, where he cannot give him pocket money, where the mother cannot boil a bowl of soup, such a thing is not possible. We cannot protect not only the institution of family, but also the lives of the women and children living under that roof.
Fertility has fallen; Yes, it is a national security issue, a matter of existence and nonexistence. Even France, Ireland, Germany and many other European countries have surpassed Türkiye in fertility. Türkiye's population in 2100 is estimated to be 54-55 million. This means that, unfortunately, when a child born today reaches the age of 75, half of the population will be a member of a society over the age of 65. So what kind of society is it? We will no longer be a society that needs more schools, more universities, but more hospitals, more nursing homes, more nursing homes. We will be a society whose labor force participation has decreased, we will be a society whose production has decreased and consumption has increased. Considering the increasing trend in elderly poverty, we will be a society that will not be able to realize that consumption and will have lost this opportunity.
Now, Mr. President raises his hand and says "5 children". I say it again: They cannot give birth, Mr. Minister, so give them the awareness you want in these economic conditions, raise awareness. Since they are already conscious, they cannot give birth because it is not only a matter of giving birth, but also a matter of raising a child as a child who is useful to the country, the nation, as a child who has completed his own development. Yes, if they give birth, those children will be the murderers of Ahmet Minguzzi, they will be like those who raided the police station in Balçova, they will be like those who murdered Hakan Çakır, they will be Caspers, Daltons, Red Kits, that is how they are born. Drugs, money laundering, illegal betting, extortion, hitman by online order; Now such a new generation mafia is roaming our streets, Z mafia and children are members of this mafia.

They become child militants of terrorist organisations, as you know, PKK's 8-12 year old battalion, and by the way, all over the world - I mean, we never talk about this, it's probably a cyclical thing, an obscuration due to the process - terrorist organizations are one of the biggest production centers of criminals. Since 2012, there has been a 159 percent increase in the number of child militants of terrorist organizations, 40 percent of them are girls and these girls are also subjected to sexual slavery, but for example, We act as if this does not exist, that is, when we talk about violence against children or violence against women, we act as if this does not exist. I really understand this ignoring and obscuring, but I cannot find it suitable for my own country.
Let me continue with the children, we need to hold on tightly to them. We talked about the fertility rate. When we look at it, although it is not sustainable, our child population is currently at the top of Europe with 24 percent and this is a great opportunity, so we are wasting this opportunity. Unfortunately, under the title of "Children's Rights" in the European Commission 2025 Türkiye Report, there is a record of "no progress" on many topics, from the implementation of the legislation to violence and access to education. The number of crimes involving children in 2024 increased by 9.8 percent in just one year compared to 2023 - as we always say, almost 10 percent. Eurostat data: Our rate of children at risk of poverty and social exclusion is 39 percent, we are 15 points above the European average in this area. Children Are Safe Teams have so far taken 46,754 children from the streets - those begging and forced labor - but I wonder if this has turned into a permanent result, what is the rate of these children returning to the streets afterwards? Because it is estimated and predicted that around 5.5 million children are in the working life - including registered, unregistered, MESEMs, all of them - and this means that 1 in every 5 children is working and dying. At the same time, these children, that is, 71 children in 2024, and 72 children from September 2024 to August 2025, died in work murders. I'm wondering if you have any field work specifically on children under the age of 15. I mean, do you have an analysis of the situation of these children? play age
Children can be made to work in underground workplaces, but it is very tragic that they cannot go to nursery or school. We rank last among OECD countries in the participation rate of 3-year-old children in pre-school education, with 15 percent; Likewise, we are the only country in the OECD that remains below 50 percent at age 4. Again, the OECD report shows that 20 percent of 15-year-old students cannot eat at least one day a week because they do not have enough money, and 1 in 5 children go to school hungry.
I'm going back to the beginning, no matter what you do, despite all this data, can any ministry, institution or organization have the ability to solve a problem that is ignored in the ranks of power while poverty is called "perception"? Now, it's a bit fantastic when we haven't solved hunger yet, but according to OECD data, we are at the bottom with Colombia and Mexico in terms of internet access.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
MAYOR MEHMET MUŞ - Here you go.

SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - I would like to share with you a very scary data from the Ministry of Justice Justice Statistics 2024 Report: From 2015 to 2024, the sexual abuse file of children in the public prosecutor's offices increased by 84 percent. I looked at the verdicts, Mr. Minister, and it was decided to postpone the announcement of the verdicts for 9,087 defendants. Now, there is a verdict, it is postponed, so such a thing is unacceptable in a crime like child abuse. I mean, it could be all other crimes, but the child. We request that this be followed up because we know that there is no greater incentive for subsequent crimes than the first crime that goes unpunished.
I also wanted to enter poverty, but probably the time would not be very suitable for that.
I will say one last thing: Now, the accusations and criticisms are very intense. Of course, all of these are areas that concern all of us personally. Now, regarding how accurately the opposition was informed, I think the Ministry staff, the interlocutors of this issue, should make a self-criticism because we submitted 1,373 parliamentary questions in the 28th period as of November 11, 2025, and only 155 of them, that is, 11.2 percent, were answered within the deadline, 67 percent were answered after the deadline, and 18.7 percent were not answered at all. Now, in order for our criticisms to be fair and realistic, we need to have real data, that is, you will inform us, you will give us what we want to know, so that we can raise the criticisms on the basis of the fair criticism you expect from the Parliament. Therefore, I request sensitivity regarding these questions.
Thank you.

records.originalTurkish:
SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Teşekkür ederim Sayın Başkan.
Sayın Bakan, Balkan uyuşturucu rotası üzerindeki Tekirdağ'da, en son Kapaklı ilçemizde okul önlerinde satılan, 4 bin kullanımlık, peçeteye emdirilmiş bonzai ele geçirildi. Tekirdağ'ın bağımlılıkla mücadelede yaşadığı bu konum dezavantajı dolayısıyla gençleri spora yönlendirmek bizim için bir kurtuluş aynı zamanda. Bu yüzden yerele dair taleplerimizde pozitif ayrımcılık istiyoruz sizden.
Tekirdağspor, Çorluspor, profesyonel ligdeki temsilcimiz Çorluspor, 1947... Altmış yetmiş yıldır köklü şehir takımları olan bir il Tekirdağ. Katma değer üretimi, vergi tahsilat oranlarında hep üst sıralarda, 1 milyondan fazla nüfusu var fakat şehir stadyumu kapasitesi 4.300. Betonda böyle karton serip oturuyoruz tribünlerde. İstanbul'a yakınlığı, ulaşım kolaylığıyla birçok uluslararası organizasyonda aslında İstanbul'un yükünü bölebileceğiniz bir konumdayken Tekirdağ hangi suçu işledi de hem stadyum hem de spor salonu yatırımından mahrum bırakılıyor biz gerçekten bilmek istiyoruz. Tekirdağ'a diğer büyükşehirlerle eş standartlarda bir stadyum ve yine aynı standartlarda bir spor salonu istiyoruz.
İki hafta önce, 1. Amatörde, Namık Kemal Spor-Bıyıkali Spor maçında bir futbolcu kafasına darbe aldı. Ambulans olmadığı için
dakikalarca yerde öylece yattı, her şey başına gelebilirdi. Hem saha içinde hem tribünde ciddi yaralanma risklerinin olduğu bu müsabakalarda bir ambulans ve sağlık görevlisinin bulunma zorunluluğu yok mudur, olması gerekmez mi? Bu konuda hem bir girişim hem de sıkı denetim bekliyoruz sizden.
3.Lig'de mücadele eden bir kadın futbol takımımız var, Büyük Yoncalıspor, idman ve maçlara ulaşımları işkence; keza Saray başta olmak üzere bütün ilçelerimizde amatör kulüpler için geçerli bu. Yerel yönetimlerle ulaşım alanında bir protokol yapılamaz mı, merak ediyoruz bunu da.
Bu talep Bursa'dan ama hemen her ilde aynı sorun var: Osmangazi, Yunuseli, Batı Trakya Olimpik, Çağlayan Genç Yetenekler, Soğanlı ve Alpagutspor bütün yükümlülüklerini yerine getirdikleri hâlde tescil edilmiyorlar. Sizden saha ya da para istemiyorlar, "Tescilimizi yapın." diyorlar sadece. Bu, Bursa için 350 çocuğu sokaktan ve sokağın tehlikelerinden güvenli ve sağlıklı spor alanına kazandırmak demek. Şimdi, şöyle bir iddia var: Yeni yılda kulüplerden talep edilen tescil ücreti 600 bin liraya çıkarılacak, onun için bu kulüpler oyalanıyor. Doğru mudur bu iddia, onu da merak ediyoruz. Dileriz, değildir; dileriz, çocukların spor aşkı paraya tahvil edilmiyordur.
Marmaraereğlisi ilçemizde bizim halı sahalar yıkıldı, belediyenin sorumluluk alanı ama yani çok uzun zaman oldu, yapılmıyor. Burada devreye girebilme imkânınız varsa seviniriz. Ve "halı saha" demişken kalp krizine bağlı çok sayıda ölüm vakası yaşandı buralarda. İlk yardım odası ve malzemeleri yoksa bu işletmelerin sadece puanı kırılıyor, buralara "ilk yardım sertifikalı görevli zorunluluğu" ve uyulmazsa da "faaliyet durdurma" gibi caydırıcı ceza düzenlemesi yapılamaz mı? Spor salonlarının spor kulüplerine kiralanma ücretleri için belirlediğiniz bir tavan oran var mıdır merak ediyoruz; yoksa yine Tekirdağ'da 2024'te yaşandığı gibi yüzde 300'lere varan zamlarla karşılaşacak mı kulüpler?
Ben gençliğe dair aslında konuşmak isterdim sizinle ama o alanda, kusura bakmayın, yoksunuz Sayın Bakan, göremiyoruz sizi. Gençlik aslen bir ticari organizasyon olan profesyonellik ve kulüplere feda edilemeyecek kadar değerli ve önceliklidir. Bir beka meselesi olan herkes için de öyle olmak zorundadır. Dolayısıyla, aslında gençlik, Spor Bakanlığından ayrılarak müstakil bir bakanlığa kavuşturulmalıdır ama bu olana kadar da biz sizi hem KHK'lerdeki insanlık dışılıklara karşı gençlerin tarafında... Anayasal düzene karşı olanlar Meclise taşınıyor ama ellerinde Türk Bayraklarıyla anayasal haklarını kullanan gençler cezaevlerinde. Biz, sizi, özgürlükleri, eğitim hakları gasbedilen gençlerimizin maruz kaldığı hak ve hukuk ihlallerine karşı yine gençlerin tarafında; belki Aile Bakanlığının çocuklar için yaptığı gibi gerçekten hak ve hukuk ihlali olan davalarda gençlerin tarafı olarak, müdahil olarak görmek istiyoruz.
Teşekkür ediyorum, bütçeniz hayırlı olsun.
records.englishTranslation:
SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Dear Minister, 4 thousand reusable bonsai soaked in napkins, sold in front of schools in Tekirdağ, on the Balkan drug route, and most recently in our Kapaklı district, were seized. Directing young people to sports is also a salvation for us due to the disadvantage of Tekirdağ's position in the fight against addiction. That's why we ask for positive discrimination in our local demands.
Tekirdağspor, Çorluspor, our representative in the professional league, Çorluspor, 1947. Tekirdağ is a province that has had well-established city teams for sixty or seventy years. It is always at the top in terms of value added production and tax collection rates. It has a population of more than 1 million, but the capacity of the city stadium is 4,300. We spread cardboard like this on the concrete and sit in the stands. While it is in a position where you can share the burden of Istanbul in many international organizations with its proximity to Istanbul and ease of transportation, we really want to know what crime did Tekirdağ commit to be deprived of both stadium and sports hall investment. We want Tekirdağ to have a stadium of the same standards as other metropolitan cities and a sports hall of the same standards.
Two weeks ago, in the 1st Amateur, a football player was hit in the head during the Namık Kemal Spor-Bıyıkali Spor match. Because there is no ambulance
He lay on the ground for minutes, anything could happen to him. Isn't it mandatory to have an ambulance and a paramedic in these competitions where there are serious risks of injury both on the field and in the stands? We expect both initiative and strict control from you in this regard.
We have a women's football team, Büyük Yoncalıspor, competing in the 3rd League, transportation to training and matches is torture; This is also valid for amateur clubs in all our districts, especially Saray. We wonder if a protocol can be made with local governments in the field of transportation.
This request is from Bursa, but there is the same problem in almost every province: Osmangazi, Yunuseli, Western Thrace Olimpik, Çağlayan Young Talents, Soğanlı and Alpagutspor are not registered even though they fulfill all their obligations. They don't want a field or money from you, "Do our registration." they just say. For Bursa, this means bringing 350 children from the streets and the dangers of the streets to the safe and healthy sports area. Now, there is a claim: The registration fee requested from clubs will be increased to 600 thousand liras in the new year, and that is why these clubs are stalling. We are wondering whether this claim is true. We hope it is not; We hope that children's love of sports does not translate into money.
In our Marmaraereğlisi district, our astroturf pitches were demolished, it is the responsibility of the municipality, but it has been a long time and it has not been done. We would be happy if you have the opportunity to intervene here. And speaking of "astroturf", there were many deaths due to heart attacks here. If there is no first aid room and equipment, these businesses only lose their points. Couldn't a deterrent penalty such as "first aid certified officer obligation" and "stopping of activity" if not complied with be made?

We are wondering if there is a ceiling rate for the rental fees of gyms to sports clubs; Or will clubs face increases of up to 300 percent, as happened in Tekirdağ in 2024?
I would actually like to talk to you about youth, but in that area, I'm sorry, you are not there, Mr. Minister, we cannot see you. Youth is too valuable and a priority to be sacrificed to professionalism and clubs, which are essentially commercial organizations. It has to be the same for everyone who has a matter of survival. Therefore, in fact, youth should be separated from the Ministry of Sports and given an independent ministry, but until this happens, we will support you and the youth against the inhumanity in the Decree Laws. Those who are against the constitutional order are moving to the Parliament, but young people who exercise their constitutional rights with Turkish Flags in their hands are in prisons. We are on the side of young people against the violations of rights and law suffered by our young people, whose freedoms and education rights have been usurped; Maybe we want to see young people as parties and interveners in cases where there is a real violation of rights and law, as the Ministry of Family does for children.
Thank you, good luck with your budget.

records.originalTurkish:
SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Teşekkür ederim Sayın Başkan.
Sayın Bakan, Balkan uyuşturucu rotası üzerindeki Tekirdağ'da, en son Kapaklı ilçemizde okul önlerinde satılan, 4 bin kullanımlık, peçeteye emdirilmiş bonzai ele geçirildi. Tekirdağ'ın bağımlılıkla mücadelede yaşadığı bu konum dezavantajı dolayısıyla gençleri spora yönlendirmek bizim için bir kurtuluş aynı zamanda. Bu yüzden yerele dair taleplerimizde pozitif ayrımcılık istiyoruz sizden.
Tekirdağspor, Çorluspor, profesyonel ligdeki temsilcimiz Çorluspor, 1947... Altmış yetmiş yıldır köklü şehir takımları olan bir il Tekirdağ. Katma değer üretimi, vergi tahsilat oranlarında hep üst sıralarda, 1 milyondan fazla nüfusu var fakat şehir stadyumu kapasitesi 4.300. Betonda böyle karton serip oturuyoruz tribünlerde. İstanbul'a yakınlığı, ulaşım kolaylığıyla birçok uluslararası organizasyonda aslında İstanbul'un yükünü bölebileceğiniz bir konumdayken Tekirdağ hangi suçu işledi de hem stadyum hem de spor salonu yatırımından mahrum bırakılıyor biz gerçekten bilmek istiyoruz. Tekirdağ'a diğer büyükşehirlerle eş standartlarda bir stadyum ve yine aynı standartlarda bir spor salonu istiyoruz.
İki hafta önce, 1. Amatörde, Namık Kemal Spor-Bıyıkali Spor maçında bir futbolcu kafasına darbe aldı. Ambulans olmadığı için
dakikalarca yerde öylece yattı, her şey başına gelebilirdi. Hem saha içinde hem tribünde ciddi yaralanma risklerinin olduğu bu müsabakalarda bir ambulans ve sağlık görevlisinin bulunma zorunluluğu yok mudur, olması gerekmez mi? Bu konuda hem bir girişim hem de sıkı denetim bekliyoruz sizden.
3.Lig'de mücadele eden bir kadın futbol takımımız var, Büyük Yoncalıspor, idman ve maçlara ulaşımları işkence; keza Saray başta olmak üzere bütün ilçelerimizde amatör kulüpler için geçerli bu. Yerel yönetimlerle ulaşım alanında bir protokol yapılamaz mı, merak ediyoruz bunu da.
Bu talep Bursa'dan ama hemen her ilde aynı sorun var: Osmangazi, Yunuseli, Batı Trakya Olimpik, Çağlayan Genç Yetenekler, Soğanlı ve Alpagutspor bütün yükümlülüklerini yerine getirdikleri hâlde tescil edilmiyorlar. Sizden saha ya da para istemiyorlar, "Tescilimizi yapın." diyorlar sadece. Bu, Bursa için 350 çocuğu sokaktan ve sokağın tehlikelerinden güvenli ve sağlıklı spor alanına kazandırmak demek. Şimdi, şöyle bir iddia var: Yeni yılda kulüplerden talep edilen tescil ücreti 600 bin liraya çıkarılacak, onun için bu kulüpler oyalanıyor. Doğru mudur bu iddia, onu da merak ediyoruz. Dileriz, değildir; dileriz, çocukların spor aşkı paraya tahvil edilmiyordur.
Marmaraereğlisi ilçemizde bizim halı sahalar yıkıldı, belediyenin sorumluluk alanı ama yani çok uzun zaman oldu, yapılmıyor. Burada devreye girebilme imkânınız varsa seviniriz. Ve "halı saha" demişken kalp krizine bağlı çok sayıda ölüm vakası yaşandı buralarda. İlk yardım odası ve malzemeleri yoksa bu işletmelerin sadece puanı kırılıyor, buralara "ilk yardım sertifikalı görevli zorunluluğu" ve uyulmazsa da "faaliyet durdurma" gibi caydırıcı ceza düzenlemesi yapılamaz mı? Spor salonlarının spor kulüplerine kiralanma ücretleri için belirlediğiniz bir tavan oran var mıdır merak ediyoruz; yoksa yine Tekirdağ'da 2024'te yaşandığı gibi yüzde 300'lere varan zamlarla karşılaşacak mı kulüpler?
Ben gençliğe dair aslında konuşmak isterdim sizinle ama o alanda, kusura bakmayın, yoksunuz Sayın Bakan, göremiyoruz sizi. Gençlik aslen bir ticari organizasyon olan profesyonellik ve kulüplere feda edilemeyecek kadar değerli ve önceliklidir. Bir beka meselesi olan herkes için de öyle olmak zorundadır. Dolayısıyla, aslında gençlik, Spor Bakanlığından ayrılarak müstakil bir bakanlığa kavuşturulmalıdır ama bu olana kadar da biz sizi hem KHK'lerdeki insanlık dışılıklara karşı gençlerin tarafında... Anayasal düzene karşı olanlar Meclise taşınıyor ama ellerinde Türk Bayraklarıyla anayasal haklarını kullanan gençler cezaevlerinde. Biz, sizi, özgürlükleri, eğitim hakları gasbedilen gençlerimizin maruz kaldığı hak ve hukuk ihlallerine karşı yine gençlerin tarafında; belki Aile Bakanlığının çocuklar için yaptığı gibi gerçekten hak ve hukuk ihlali olan davalarda gençlerin tarafı olarak, müdahil olarak görmek istiyoruz.
Teşekkür ediyorum, bütçeniz hayırlı olsun.
records.englishTranslation:
SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Dear Minister, 4 thousand reusable bonsai soaked in napkins, sold in front of schools in Tekirdağ, on the Balkan drug route, and most recently in our Kapaklı district, were seized. Directing young people to sports is also a salvation for us due to the disadvantage of Tekirdağ's position in the fight against addiction. That's why we ask for positive discrimination in our local demands.
Tekirdağspor, Çorluspor, our representative in the professional league, Çorluspor, 1947. Tekirdağ is a province that has had well-established city teams for sixty or seventy years. It is always at the top in terms of value added production and tax collection rates. It has a population of more than 1 million, but the capacity of the city stadium is 4,300. We spread cardboard like this on the concrete and sit in the stands. While it is in a position where you can share the burden of Istanbul in many international organizations with its proximity to Istanbul and ease of transportation, we really want to know what crime did Tekirdağ commit to be deprived of both stadium and sports hall investment. We want Tekirdağ to have a stadium of the same standards as other metropolitan cities and a sports hall of the same standards.
Two weeks ago, in the 1st Amateur, a football player was hit in the head during the Namık Kemal Spor-Bıyıkali Spor match. Because there is no ambulance
He lay on the ground for minutes, anything could happen to him. Isn't it mandatory to have an ambulance and a paramedic in these competitions where there are serious risks of injury both on the field and in the stands? We expect both initiative and strict control from you in this regard.
We have a women's football team, Büyük Yoncalıspor, competing in the 3rd League, transportation to training and matches is torture; This is also valid for amateur clubs in all our districts, especially Saray. We wonder if a protocol can be made with local governments in the field of transportation.
This request is from Bursa, but there is the same problem in almost every province: Osmangazi, Yunuseli, Western Thrace Olimpik, Çağlayan Young Talents, Soğanlı and Alpagutspor are not registered even though they fulfill all their obligations. They don't want a field or money from you, "Do our registration." they just say. For Bursa, this means bringing 350 children from the streets and the dangers of the streets to the safe and healthy sports area. Now, there is a claim: The registration fee requested from clubs will be increased to 600 thousand liras in the new year, and that is why these clubs are stalling. We are wondering whether this claim is true. We hope it is not; We hope that children's love of sports does not translate into money.
In our Marmaraereğlisi district, our astroturf pitches were demolished, it is the responsibility of the municipality, but it has been a long time and it has not been done. We would be happy if you have the opportunity to intervene here. And speaking of "astroturf", there were many deaths due to heart attacks here. If there is no first aid room and equipment, these businesses only lose their points. Couldn't a deterrent penalty such as "first aid certified officer obligation" and "stopping of activity" if not complied with be made?

We are wondering if there is a ceiling rate for the rental fees of gyms to sports clubs; Or will clubs face increases of up to 300 percent, as happened in Tekirdağ in 2024?
I would actually like to talk to you about youth, but in that area, I'm sorry, you are not there, Mr. Minister, we cannot see you. Youth is too valuable and a priority to be sacrificed to professionalism and clubs, which are essentially commercial organizations. It has to be the same for everyone who has a matter of survival. Therefore, in fact, youth should be separated from the Ministry of Sports and given an independent ministry, but until this happens, we will support you and the youth against the inhumanity in the Decree Laws. Those who are against the constitutional order are moving to the Parliament, but young people who exercise their constitutional rights with Turkish Flags in their hands are in prisons. We are on the side of young people against the violations of rights and law suffered by our young people, whose freedoms and education rights have been usurped; Maybe we want to see young people as parties and interveners in cases where there is a real violation of rights and law, as the Ministry of Family does for children.
Thank you, good luck with your budget.

records.originalTurkish:
SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Teşekkür ederim Sayın Başkan.
Sayın Bakan, 14 Mayıs 2025'te Fener Rum Patrikhanesi'nin "ekümenik" sıfatını kullandığını, Papa'yı da İznik'te bu sıfatla ağırlayacağını hatırlatarak özetle şunu sordum size: "Lozan'dan bugüne Türk devletinin patrikhane politikası değişmiş midir?" Siz de 3 Temmuz tarihli cevabınızda dediniz ki: "Lozan Barış Antlaşması'nda Fener Rum Patrikhanesi'nin statüsü hakkında bir hüküm bulunmamaktadır." Takdir edersiniz ki bunu biz de biliyoruz ama bir detay var orada ki devamında siz de söylüyorsunuz cevabınızda aslında: "10 Ocak 1923 tarihli oturumda patrikliğin siyasal işlerle uğraşamayacağı, salt din alanındaki işlerle yetineceğine dair mutabakat benimsenmiştir. Keza, Trabzon'da patriğe "Ekümenik Patrik Bartholomeos" yazılıp Trabzonspor forması verildiğinde, Fatih Kaymakamlığı Bakanlığınızdan farklı olarak bunu normalleştirmedi ve şu açıklamayı yaptı: "Lozan'da her ne kadar bir hüküm bulunmasa da patrikhanenin mübadele dışı tutulan Rum cemaatinin..." Yani, bakın, dinî muhatapları da aslında tanımlı ve sınırlıdır orada. Yani öyle bütün Hristiyan âlemi falan değil muhatabı dolayısıyla da din alanında da evrensel olabileceğini varsayamayız faaliyetlerinin. "İstanbul, Bozcaada ve Gökçeada Rum cemaatinin dinî ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak üzere kalacak, siyasi bir faaliyette bulunmayacağına ilişkin katılımcı ülke delegasyonlarının sözleri de senet kabul edilecek." Yani "Lozan'da hüküm yok." deyip sıyrılamayız biz bununla ilgili eleştirilerden. Yine Fatih Kaymakamlığı diyor ki söz konusu açıklamada: "Yargıtay 4. Dairesinin egemen bir devletin azınlıklara kendi vatandaşlarından farklı bir hukuk uygulayarak çoğunluğa dahi tanımadığı ayrıcalıkları onlara tanımak suretiyle özel statü vermesi Anayasa’nın 10'uncu maddesine aykırıdır kararı uyarınca yasal dayanağı yoktur, patrikhanenin 'ekümenik' sıfatı bulunmamaktadır." Yani Anayasa'mıza da aykırı. Şimdi, Fatih Müftüsü, hilafetin kaldırılmasından sonraki yasaları rafa kaldırıp kendini halife ilan edip Müslüman ülke liderleriyle bir araya gelebilir mi? Mümkün değil böyle bir şey. Bir de mütekabiliyet var biliyorsunuz Batı Trakya'yla bu meselede. Batı Trakya Türklüğü -eğer özgürce seçebilirlerse müftülerini, bunu bile sağlayamıyoruz maalesef- müftüleri, Türk azınlığın dini temsilcisi olarak öyle fellik fellik bütün dünyayı gezip de dünya liderleriyle buluşup da statü dayatabilirler mi kendi ülkelerine mütekabiliyet varsa? İskeçe Müftüsü, "İskeçe" adını ya, "İskeçe" adını kullanabilir mi herhangi bir yazışmasında; değil ki resmî evrak? Biliyorsunuz, bir film broşüründe bu isim kullanıldığı için kıyamet koptu Yunanistan'da.
Şimdi, diyorsunuz ki: "'Ekümenik' dinî terminoloji, ilahiyat çalışmalarının konusu." Çok güzel. Patriğin İstanbul'a "Konstantinopolis" demesi, bir ilahiyat çalışması mıdır? Ukrayna Barış Konferansı'na ekümenik patrik sıfatıyla katılması, devlet başkanlarıyla resmî görüşme yapması, aynı zirvede patrikhanenin -Avrupa Konseyi gibi mesela- uluslararası kuruluşlar listesinde yer alması, "Resmî görüşme yapmadık." diye siz yalanladınız ama
bu ülkenin bir memurunun nihayetinde görüştüğü liderler listesinde yabancı lidermiş gibi sizi de yazıyor olması; bütün bunlar ilahiyat çalışması mıdır mesela? Çok doluyum ama vakit yok bu konuda. Yani, Papa 27-30 Kasım arası Türkiye'de olacak. 28 Kasım İznik'in Yunan işgalinden kurtuluş günü. Şimdi, Patrik bu toplantıyı Romanya'da yaptığı konuşmada -yani bizim paranoyamız değil- kendisi 1920 Genelgesi'ne dayandırıyor. Patrikhanenin 1918-1921 misyonu İstanbul'un Yunanistan'a bırakılmasıdır Sayın Bakan, nasıl bir atıftır bu? Biz eğer İstanbul'u vermek niyetinde değilsek niye sessiz kalıyoruz bu çıkışlara? 1919 mektubu, İstanbul'un Türklerden alınması; 1920 Genelgesi de bu konudaki listelerin ortaklığı. Şimdi, bütün bunlar ilahiyat çalışması mıdır? İstanbul, Gökçeada, Bozcaada'da değil yani görev alanında değil; Yunanistan'ın Paris Anlaşması'nı da çiğneyerek silahlandırdığı Sömbeki'de yardımcı piskopos ataması mesela Patriğin bir ilahiyat çalışması mıdır? Patrik ABD'nin koç başlığına soyununca Rusya'yla krizin eşiğinden dönmedik mi biz Ukrayna Kilisesi yüzünden? Bu ilahiyat çalışması mıdır mesela? Antakya Rum Kilisesi'nin yıkılmasıyla ilgili Sayın Cumhurbaşkanına, çok da iyi Türkçe bildiği hâlde, devlet içi bir yazışmayı Rumca yapması, bu bir ilahiyat çalışması mıdır? Trump'la, Tom Barrack'la Ruhban Okulu görüşmesi ve dış müdahale talebinde bulunması...
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Biz müstemleke miyiz Sayın Bakan? Bunlara bir tepki bekliyoruz.
records.englishTranslation:
SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Mr. Minister, reminding that the Fener Greek Patriarchate used the title of "ecumenical" on May 14, 2025 and that it will host the Pope in Iznik with this title, I asked you briefly: "Has the patriarchate policy of the Turkish state changed since Lausanne?" You also said in your response dated July 3: "There is no provision in the Lausanne Peace Treaty about the status of the Fener Greek Patriarchate." As you may appreciate, we know this, but there is a detail that you also say in your answer: "In the session dated January 10, 1923, an agreement was adopted that the patriarchate would not deal with political affairs and would be content with matters solely in the field of religion. Likewise, when the patriarch in Trabzon was given a Trabzonspor jersey with the name "Ecumenical Patriarch Bartholomeos" written on it, unlike your Ministry, the Fatih District Governorship did not normalize this and made the following statement: "Although there is no provision in Lausanne, the Greek community of the patriarchate is excluded from exchange." In other words, its religious addressees are actually defined and limited. In other words, its addressees are not the whole Christian world, so we cannot assume that its activities can be universal in the field of religion. "It will remain to meet the religious needs of the Greek community of Istanbul, Bozcaada and Gökçeada, and the words of the participating country delegations will be accepted as a bond." We cannot get away from criticism by saying "There is no provision in Lausanne." Again, the Fatih District Governorate says in the statement in question: "According to the decision of the 4th Chamber of the Supreme Court of Appeals, granting special status to minorities by granting them privileges that they do not even grant to the majority has no legal basis, the patriarchate has no 'ecumenical' title." In other words, it is also against our Constitution, Fatih Mufti said. Can he put aside the laws after the abolition of the caliphate and declare himself as the caliph and meet with the leaders of Muslim countries? You know, there is reciprocity in this issue with Western Thrace. If they can freely elect their muftis, unfortunately we cannot even provide this, can their muftis travel all over the world as the religious representatives of the Turkish minority and meet with world leaders and impose a status on their own country? Can the Mufti use the name "Xanthi" or "Xanthi" in any of his correspondence, not in official documents? You know, all hell broke loose in Greece because this name was used in a movie brochure.
Now, you say: "'Ecumenical' religious terminology is the subject of theological studies." Very beautiful. Is it a work of theology when the Patriarch calls Istanbul "Constantinople"? His participation in the Ukrainian Peace Conference as the ecumenical patriarch, his official meeting with the heads of state, and the fact that the patriarchate was included in the list of international organizations - such as the Council of Europe - at the same summit, "We did not have an official meeting.

" you denied but
The fact that a civil servant of this country eventually lists you as a foreign leader in the list of leaders he meets with; For example, is all this a study of theology? I am very busy but there is no time for this. So, the Pope will be in Türkiye between 27-30 November. November 28 is the liberation day of Iznik from Greek occupation. Now, in his speech in Romania, the Patriarch bases this meeting on the 1920 Circular - not our paranoia. The 1918-1921 mission of the Patriarchate is the ceding of Istanbul to Greece Dear Minister, what kind of reference is this? If we do not intend to give Istanbul away, why do we remain silent about these exits? 1919 letter, the capture of Istanbul from the Turks; The 1920 Circular is also a partnership of lists on this subject. Now, is all this a study of theology? Not in Istanbul, Gökçeada, Bozcaada, that is, not in his field of duty; For example, is the appointment of an auxiliary bishop in Symi, which Greece armed in violation of the Paris Agreement, a theological work of the Patriarch? Didn't we come back from the brink of crisis with Russia because of the Ukrainian Church when the Patriarch took over the US ram's head? For example, is this a study of theology? Is this a work of theology if he wrote an internal state correspondence in Greek to Mr. President regarding the demolition of the Antakya Greek Church, even though he speaks Turkish very well? Seminary meeting with Trump, Tom Barrack and request for foreign intervention.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Are we a colony, Mr. Minister? We are waiting for a reaction to these.

Yani, bakın, dinî muhatapları da aslında tanımlı ve sınırlıdır orada. Yani öyle bütün Hristiyan âlemi falan değil muhatabı dolayısıyla da din alanında da evrensel olabileceğini varsayamayız faaliyetlerinin. "İstanbul, Bozcaada ve Gökçeada Rum cemaatinin dinî ihtiyaçlarını karşılamak üzere kalacak, siyasi bir faaliyette bulunmayacağına ilişkin katılımcı ülke delegasyonlarının sözleri de senet kabul edilecek." Yani "Lozan'da hüküm yok." deyip sıyrılamayız biz bununla ilgili eleştirilerden. Yine Fatih Kaymakamlığı diyor ki söz konusu açıklamada: "Yargıtay 4. Dairesinin egemen bir devletin azınlıklara kendi vatandaşlarından farklı bir hukuk uygulayarak çoğunluğa dahi tanımadığı ayrıcalıkları onlara tanımak suretiyle özel statü vermesi Anayasa’nın 10'uncu maddesine aykırıdır kararı uyarınca yasal dayanağı yoktur, patrikhanenin 'ekümenik' sıfatı bulunmamaktadır." Yani Anayasa'mıza da aykırı. Şimdi, Fatih Müftüsü, hilafetin kaldırılmasından sonraki yasaları rafa kaldırıp kendini halife ilan edip Müslüman ülke liderleriyle bir araya gelebilir mi? Mümkün değil böyle bir şey. Bir de mütekabiliyet var biliyorsunuz Batı Trakya'yla bu meselede. Batı Trakya Türklüğü -eğer özgürce seçebilirlerse müftülerini, bunu bile sağlayamıyoruz maalesef- müftüleri, Türk azınlığın dini temsilcisi olarak öyle fellik fellik bütün dünyayı gezip de dünya liderleriyle buluşup da statü dayatabilirler mi kendi ülkelerine mütekabiliyet varsa? İskeçe Müftüsü, "İskeçe" adını ya, "İskeçe" adını kullanabilir mi herhangi bir yazışmasında; değil ki resmî evrak? Biliyorsunuz, bir film broşüründe bu isim kullanıldığı için kıyamet koptu Yunanistan'da.
Şimdi, diyorsunuz ki: "'Ekümenik' dinî terminoloji, ilahiyat çalışmalarının konusu." Çok güzel. Patriğin İstanbul'a "Konstantinopolis" demesi, bir ilahiyat çalışması mıdır? Ukrayna Barış Konferansı'na ekümenik patrik sıfatıyla katılması, devlet başkanlarıyla resmî görüşme yapması, aynı zirvede patrikhanenin -Avrupa Konseyi gibi mesela- uluslararası kuruluşlar listesinde yer alması, "Resmî görüşme yapmadık." diye siz yalanladınız ama
bu ülkenin bir memurunun nihayetinde görüştüğü liderler listesinde yabancı lidermiş gibi sizi de yazıyor olması; bütün bunlar ilahiyat çalışması mıdır mesela? Çok doluyum ama vakit yok bu konuda. Yani, Papa 27-30 Kasım arası Türkiye'de olacak. 28 Kasım İznik'in Yunan işgalinden kurtuluş günü. Şimdi, Patrik bu toplantıyı Romanya'da yaptığı konuşmada -yani bizim paranoyamız değil- kendisi 1920 Genelgesi'ne dayandırıyor. Patrikhanenin 1918-1921 misyonu İstanbul'un Yunanistan'a bırakılmasıdır Sayın Bakan, nasıl bir atıftır bu? Biz eğer İstanbul'u vermek niyetinde değilsek niye sessiz kalıyoruz bu çıkışlara? 1919 mektubu, İstanbul'un Türklerden alınması; 1920 Genelgesi de bu konudaki listelerin ortaklığı. Şimdi, bütün bunlar ilahiyat çalışması mıdır? İstanbul, Gökçeada, Bozcaada'da değil yani görev alanında değil; Yunanistan'ın Paris Anlaşması'nı da çiğneyerek silahlandırdığı Sömbeki'de yardımcı piskopos ataması mesela Patriğin bir ilahiyat çalışması mıdır? Patrik ABD'nin koç başlığına soyununca Rusya'yla krizin eşiğinden dönmedik mi biz Ukrayna Kilisesi yüzünden? Bu ilahiyat çalışması mıdır mesela? Antakya Rum Kilisesi'nin yıkılmasıyla ilgili Sayın Cumhurbaşkanına, çok da iyi Türkçe bildiği hâlde, devlet içi bir yazışmayı Rumca yapması, bu bir ilahiyat çalışması mıdır? Trump'la, Tom Barrack'la Ruhban Okulu görüşmesi ve dış müdahale talebinde bulunması...
(Mikrofon otomatik cihaz tarafından kapatıldı)
SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Biz müstemleke miyiz Sayın Bakan? Bunlara bir tepki bekliyoruz.
records.englishTranslation:
SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Mr. Minister, reminding that the Fener Greek Patriarchate used the title of "ecumenical" on May 14, 2025 and that it will host the Pope in Iznik with this title, I asked you briefly: "Has the patriarchate policy of the Turkish state changed since Lausanne?" You also said in your response dated July 3: "There is no provision in the Lausanne Peace Treaty about the status of the Fener Greek Patriarchate." As you may appreciate, we know this, but there is a detail that you also say in your answer: "In the session dated January 10, 1923, an agreement was adopted that the patriarchate would not deal with political affairs and would be content with matters solely in the field of religion. Likewise, when the patriarch in Trabzon was given a Trabzonspor jersey with the name "Ecumenical Patriarch Bartholomeos" written on it, unlike your Ministry, the Fatih District Governorship did not normalize this and made the following statement: "Although there is no provision in Lausanne, the Greek community of the patriarchate is excluded from exchange." In other words, its religious addressees are actually defined and limited. In other words, its addressees are not the whole Christian world, so we cannot assume that its activities can be universal in the field of religion. "It will remain to meet the religious needs of the Greek community of Istanbul, Bozcaada and Gökçeada, and the words of the participating country delegations will be accepted as a bond." We cannot get away from criticism by saying "There is no provision in Lausanne." Again, the Fatih District Governorate says in the statement in question: "According to the decision of the 4th Chamber of the Supreme Court of Appeals, granting special status to minorities by granting them privileges that they do not even grant to the majority has no legal basis, the patriarchate has no 'ecumenical' title." In other words, it is also against our Constitution, Fatih Mufti said. Can he put aside the laws after the abolition of the caliphate and declare himself as the caliph and meet with the leaders of Muslim countries? You know, there is reciprocity in this issue with Western Thrace. If they can freely elect their muftis, unfortunately we cannot even provide this, can their muftis travel all over the world as the religious representatives of the Turkish minority and meet with world leaders and impose a status on their own country? Can the Mufti use the name "Xanthi" or "Xanthi" in any of his correspondence, not in official documents? You know, all hell broke loose in Greece because this name was used in a movie brochure.
Now, you say: "'Ecumenical' religious terminology is the subject of theological studies." Very beautiful. Is it a work of theology when the Patriarch calls Istanbul "Constantinople"? His participation in the Ukrainian Peace Conference as the ecumenical patriarch, his official meeting with the heads of state, and the fact that the patriarchate was included in the list of international organizations - such as the Council of Europe - at the same summit, "We did not have an official meeting.

" you denied but
The fact that a civil servant of this country eventually lists you as a foreign leader in the list of leaders he meets with; For example, is all this a study of theology? I am very busy but there is no time for this. So, the Pope will be in Türkiye between 27-30 November. November 28 is the liberation day of Iznik from Greek occupation. Now, in his speech in Romania, the Patriarch bases this meeting on the 1920 Circular - not our paranoia. The 1918-1921 mission of the Patriarchate is the ceding of Istanbul to Greece Dear Minister, what kind of reference is this? If we do not intend to give Istanbul away, why do we remain silent about these exits? 1919 letter, the capture of Istanbul from the Turks; The 1920 Circular is also a partnership of lists on this subject. Now, is all this a study of theology? Not in Istanbul, Gökçeada, Bozcaada, that is, not in his field of duty; For example, is the appointment of an auxiliary bishop in Symi, which Greece armed in violation of the Paris Agreement, a theological work of the Patriarch? Didn't we come back from the brink of crisis with Russia because of the Ukrainian Church when the Patriarch took over the US ram's head? For example, is this a study of theology? Is this a work of theology if he wrote an internal state correspondence in Greek to Mr. President regarding the demolition of the Antakya Greek Church, even though he speaks Turkish very well? Seminary meeting with Trump, Tom Barrack and request for foreign intervention.
(The microphone was automatically turned off by the device)
SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Are we a colony, Mr. Minister? We are waiting for a reaction to these.

fields.Subject: 2026 Yılı Merkezi Yönetim Bütçe Kanunu Teklifi (1/280) ve 2024 Yılı Merkezi Yönetim Kesin Hesap Kanunu Teklifi (1/279) ile Sayıştay tezkereleri münasebetiyle

records.originalTurkish: SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Sayın Bakan, nisan ayında sizi Halkalı-Edirne hızlı tren hattının Tekirdağ Ergene'den geçen bölümüyle ilgili -orada 2 altyapı çalışmanız var sizin ama- bir yağış durumda orayla ilgili endişelerimiz olduğundan yola çıkarak bir soru sormuştuk ve bir üst geçit ya da üçüncü bir alt geçit talebi iletmiştik. Siz teknik açıdan mümkün olduğunu ama gerek olmadığını, ihtiyaç olmadığını söylediniz. Şimdi, ilk yağışta o alt geçitlerde durum bu. Orası tarım havzası biliyorsunuz, çiftçinin ne traktörle ne de hayvanıyla buradan mümkün değil ulaşabilmeleri. Dolayısıyla "Teknik açıdan da mümkün." dediniz. O üst geçit talebini dikkate alırsanız seviniriz.
records.englishTranslation: SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Dear Minister, in April, we asked you a question about the section of the Halkalı-Edirne high-speed train line passing through Tekirdağ Ergene - you have 2 infrastructure works there, but we had concerns about that area in case of rain - and we requested an overpass or a third underpass. You said that it is technically possible, but it is not necessary, there is no need. Now, this is the situation in those underpasses during the first rain. As you know, it is an agricultural basin, it is not possible for farmers to reach here with either a tractor or their animals. Therefore, "It is also technically possible." you said. We would be happy if you would consider that overpass request.

records.originalTurkish:
SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Teşekkür ederim Sayın Başkan.
Sayın Bakan, Tekirdağ'ın depreme dayanıksızlıkları dolayısıyla yıkılıp yeniden yapılamayan okullar sorunu, siz de biliyorsunuz zaten, artık sağır sultanın da malumu. Şehir olarak biz, partilerüstü tutuyoruz bu konuyu, keza hem bir toplumsal mutabakat var hem de bütün partileri ayırmadan söylüyorum, siyasi bir mutabakat var; bu ihtiyacın giderilmesinin aciliyeti var çünkü. Çabayı yok saymıyoruz, başta Sayın Valimiz, bürokratlar öncelemeye çalışıyorlar bunu, görüyoruz ama Süleymanpaşa'da 5 okul, Marmaraereğlisi'nde 4 okul, Şarköy'de 3 okul, Hayrabolu'da 4 okul hâlâ bitişik, birleşik binalarda hizmet veriyor. Ve bu, beraberinde maalesef akademik başarısızlık getiriyor, disiplinsizlik getiriyor, zaten var olan güvenlik sorununu derinleştiriyor ve zaten var olan hijyen sorununu ağırlaştırıyor. Yapımı planlanan okullara ek olarak Tekirdağ aynı zamanda göç dolayısıyla çok hızlı nüfus artışı olan illerden bir tanesi. Özellikle Süleymanpaşa'da 100. Yıl, Atatürk, Hürriyet ve Zafer, 4 mahallemizde eğitimcilerin tespiti bu, 21'er ek derslik ihtiyacı olduğunu söylüyorlar.
Öğretmenevimiz tahliye edildi, kaderine terk edildi, orası şehrin böyle sosyal hayatının da merkeziydi, oranın yapımını bekliyoruz. Ve Muratlı'da yine, depreme dayanıksız diye tahliye edilen ama henüz yıkımı da yapılmayan okullar var ve buralar artık bir asayiş sorunu oluşturmaya başladı. Keza, Muratlı Öğretmenevi de aynı şekilde. Buralar çocukların, gençlerin uyuşturucu aldığı, istismar edildikleri suç ve kötülük yuvalarına dönüşüyor. Eğitimin sekteye uğramasının telafi gerekliliği buralarda ayrı bir problem ama dediğim sebeplerden dolayı yani buralar yıkılmadığı sürece çocuklar açısından bir can güvenliği problemine de dönüşüyor artık, oralarda gelişen maalesef, işte, hep konuşuyoruz, suça bulaşma meselesi yüzünden.
Muratlı'da 2 okulumuz, yani doksan yıllık bir binada hizmet veren Yavuz Sultan Selim Anaokulu ve Cumhuriyet İlkokulu yani fiziki şartlar anlamında berbat ötesi gerçekten. 2025 Türkiyesinde yani yağmur yağdığında tabanından, duvarlarından bir de yani işte ülkenin batı yakası, vergi sıralamasında şöyle; öyle bir şehirde böyle bir anaokulu kabul edilir de hoş görülebilir de tahammül edilebilir de değildir. Yani gerçekten yazık oradaki çocuklara çünkü oradaki yoğun rutubetten yani o küçücük bedenler çürüyorlar gözümüzün önünde. Yine, 2025 Türkiyesinde, zemininde su kaynayan bir okul Cumhuriyet İlkokulu yani 2 tane pompa oraya tahsis edilmiş durumda ve sürekli su çekiliyor oradan; bunun da yine çok acil giderilmesi gerekiyor.
Şimdi, işsiz mezun etmek dışında ve hayal kırıklığı aslında üretmek dışında hiçbir çıktısı olmayan üniversiteleri sürekli olarak artırmanın, bölüm sayısını artırmanın hiçbir anlamı olmadığını, politik bir yanlış olduğunu, hatta politikasızlığın da ispatı olduğunu düşünüyorum ben ama şimdi böyle düşünen birisi olarak bir üniversite talebim olacak, çelişki gibi duruyor olabilir; biz Çorlu'ya bir vakıf üniversitesi istiyoruz ama şu söylediğim standartlarda değil yani orası bir sanayi bölgesi, biliyorsunuz, sanayi-üniversite iş birliği mantığıyla inşa edilmiş, AR-GE çalışmalarıyla da bölge sanayisine entegre olacak, teknolojik dönüşüme de katkı sağlayacak, bölgenin siyasi ve üretim profiline uygun şekilde planlanmış ve yeni bir açık yaratmak yerine, oradaki açığı kapatacak bir vakıf üniversitesi; elini taşın altına koymaya da hazır ticaret ve sanayi odalarımız.
Ve birçok kişi bugün değindi yani tahtası yenilenemeyen, akıllı tahtaların on yıl ömrü vardı, süre doldu, yenileme imkânı yok. Şimdi böyle okulların deterjan alınmayan, sabun alınamayan bu durumdaki okulların binalarına Atatürk'le eş boyutta Cumhurbaşkanı posteri asıldı. Şimdi, gelmiş ya da geçmiş kim olursa olsun Atatürk'le yarışa girmesi yahut yarıştırılması hâlinde o yarışı kaybetmeye mahkûm benim nazarımda. Dolayısıyla o ideolojik boyutu hiç tartışmayacağım ama şöyle bir boyutu var: Bu posterlerin okullara maliyeti ne oldu, ben bunu çok merak ediyorum. Yani sabun için, yemek için, personel için bulunamayan kaynak; okullar o kaynağı bu posterler için nasıl buldular, nasıl bir maliyetti bu, hiç bunu düşündünüz mü acaba? Çünkü dediğim gibi, diğer kısmı yani aynı zamanda bir parti genel başkanının portresinin okullara asılması, bu şuuraltını tartışmayacağım hiç çünkü yüz yıl kadar geriye gitmek gerekiyor, vakit yok ona şimdi.
Çok teşekkür ediyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Dear Minister, you already know the problem of Tekirdağ's schools being demolished and not rebuilt due to their lack of resistance to earthquakes, and now the deaf sultan also knows. As a city, we keep this issue nonpartisan, because there is both a social consensus and, I say this without distinguishing all parties, a political consensus; Because there is urgency to meet this need. We do not ignore the effort, especially our Governor and the bureaucrats are trying to prioritize this, we see that, but 5 schools in Süleymanpaşa, 4 schools in Marmaraereğlisi, 3 schools in Şarköy, 4 schools in Hayrabolu are still serving in adjacent, combined buildings. And this, unfortunately, brings with it academic failure, indiscipline, deepens the already existing security problem and aggravates the already existing hygiene problem. In addition to the schools planned to be built, Tekirdağ is also one of the provinces with a very rapid population increase due to immigration. This is the determination of the educators, especially in the 4 neighborhoods of Süleymanpaşa, 100. Yıl, Atatürk, Hürriyet and Zafer, they say that there is a need for 21 additional classrooms each.
Our teacher's home was evacuated and abandoned to its fate. It was also the center of the social life of the city, we are waiting for its construction. And in Muratlı, there are schools that were evacuated because they were not earthquake resistant but have not been demolished yet, and these have now started to pose a public order problem. Likewise, Muratlı Teacher Training Center is the same way. These places turn into dens of crime and evil, where children and young people take drugs and are abused. The need to compensate for the interruption of education is a separate problem here, but for the reasons I mentioned, as long as these places are not demolished, it turns into a life safety problem for children. Unfortunately, what is developing there, we always talk about, is because of the issue of involvement in crime.
Our two schools in Muratlı, namely Yavuz Sultan Selim Kindergarten and Cumhuriyet Primary School, which serve in a ninety-year-old building, are truly beyond terrible in terms of physical conditions. In Turkey in 2025, when it rains, from its base and walls, here is the western side of the country, in tax order: In such a city, such a kindergarten is neither acceptable nor tolerable. I mean, it's really a pity for the children there, because of the intense humidity there, those tiny bodies are rotting before our eyes. Again, in 2025 Turkey, a school with boiling water on the ground is Cumhuriyet Primary School, that is, 2 pumps are allocated there and water is constantly being drawn from there; This also needs to be addressed very urgently.

Now, I think that there is no point in constantly increasing the number of departments and increasing the number of departments in universities that have no output other than graduating unemployed people and producing disappointment, and that it is a political mistake and even proof of lack of policy. But now, as someone who thinks like this, I will demand a university, it may seem like a contradiction; We want a foundation university in Çorlu, but it is not at the standards I mentioned, that is, it is an industrial zone, you know, a foundation university built with the logic of industry-university cooperation, which will integrate with the regional industry with R&D studies, contribute to technological transformation, is planned in accordance with the political and production profile of the region and will close the gap there instead of creating a new deficit; Our chambers of commerce and industry are ready to take responsibility.
And many people mentioned today that smart boards have a lifespan of ten years, the boards of which cannot be renewed, the time has expired, there is no possibility of renewal. Now, a poster of the President, the same size as Atatürk, has been hung on the buildings of such schools where detergent and soap cannot be purchased. Now, in my opinion, no matter who is present or past, if they compete or are made to compete with Atatürk, they are doomed to lose that race. Therefore, I will never discuss that ideological dimension, but there is a dimension like this: I am very curious about how much these posters cost the schools. In other words, unavailable resources for soap, food, and personnel; How did schools find that resource for these posters? What was the cost? Have you ever thought about that? Because, as I said, the other part, namely the hanging of a party chairman's portrait in schools, I will not discuss this subconscious at all, because we need to go back about a hundred years, there is no time for that now.
Thank you very much.

SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Teşekkür ederim Sayın Başkan.
Sayın Bakan, Tekirdağ'ın depreme dayanıksızlıkları dolayısıyla yıkılıp yeniden yapılamayan okullar sorunu, siz de biliyorsunuz zaten, artık sağır sultanın da malumu. Şehir olarak biz, partilerüstü tutuyoruz bu konuyu, keza hem bir toplumsal mutabakat var hem de bütün partileri ayırmadan söylüyorum, siyasi bir mutabakat var; bu ihtiyacın giderilmesinin aciliyeti var çünkü. Çabayı yok saymıyoruz, başta Sayın Valimiz, bürokratlar öncelemeye çalışıyorlar bunu, görüyoruz ama Süleymanpaşa'da 5 okul, Marmaraereğlisi'nde 4 okul, Şarköy'de 3 okul, Hayrabolu'da 4 okul hâlâ bitişik, birleşik binalarda hizmet veriyor. Ve bu, beraberinde maalesef akademik başarısızlık getiriyor, disiplinsizlik getiriyor, zaten var olan güvenlik sorununu derinleştiriyor ve zaten var olan hijyen sorununu ağırlaştırıyor. Yapımı planlanan okullara ek olarak Tekirdağ aynı zamanda göç dolayısıyla çok hızlı nüfus artışı olan illerden bir tanesi. Özellikle Süleymanpaşa'da 100. Yıl, Atatürk, Hürriyet ve Zafer, 4 mahallemizde eğitimcilerin tespiti bu, 21'er ek derslik ihtiyacı olduğunu söylüyorlar.
Öğretmenevimiz tahliye edildi, kaderine terk edildi, orası şehrin böyle sosyal hayatının da merkeziydi, oranın yapımını bekliyoruz. Ve Muratlı'da yine, depreme dayanıksız diye tahliye edilen ama henüz yıkımı da yapılmayan okullar var ve buralar artık bir asayiş sorunu oluşturmaya başladı. Keza, Muratlı Öğretmenevi de aynı şekilde. Buralar çocukların, gençlerin uyuşturucu aldığı, istismar edildikleri suç ve kötülük yuvalarına dönüşüyor. Eğitimin sekteye uğramasının telafi gerekliliği buralarda ayrı bir problem ama dediğim sebeplerden dolayı yani buralar yıkılmadığı sürece çocuklar açısından bir can güvenliği problemine de dönüşüyor artık, oralarda gelişen maalesef, işte, hep konuşuyoruz, suça bulaşma meselesi yüzünden.
Muratlı'da 2 okulumuz, yani doksan yıllık bir binada hizmet veren Yavuz Sultan Selim Anaokulu ve Cumhuriyet İlkokulu yani fiziki şartlar anlamında berbat ötesi gerçekten. 2025 Türkiyesinde yani yağmur yağdığında tabanından, duvarlarından bir de yani işte ülkenin batı yakası, vergi sıralamasında şöyle; öyle bir şehirde böyle bir anaokulu kabul edilir de hoş görülebilir de tahammül edilebilir de değildir. Yani gerçekten yazık oradaki çocuklara çünkü oradaki yoğun rutubetten yani o küçücük bedenler çürüyorlar gözümüzün önünde. Yine, 2025 Türkiyesinde, zemininde su kaynayan bir okul Cumhuriyet İlkokulu yani 2 tane pompa oraya tahsis edilmiş durumda ve sürekli su çekiliyor oradan; bunun da yine çok acil giderilmesi gerekiyor.
Şimdi, işsiz mezun etmek dışında ve hayal kırıklığı aslında üretmek dışında hiçbir çıktısı olmayan üniversiteleri sürekli olarak artırmanın, bölüm sayısını artırmanın hiçbir anlamı olmadığını, politik bir yanlış olduğunu, hatta politikasızlığın da ispatı olduğunu düşünüyorum ben ama şimdi böyle düşünen birisi olarak bir üniversite talebim olacak, çelişki gibi duruyor olabilir; biz Çorlu'ya bir vakıf üniversitesi istiyoruz ama şu söylediğim standartlarda değil yani orası bir sanayi bölgesi, biliyorsunuz, sanayi-üniversite iş birliği mantığıyla inşa edilmiş, AR-GE çalışmalarıyla da bölge sanayisine entegre olacak, teknolojik dönüşüme de katkı sağlayacak, bölgenin siyasi ve üretim profiline uygun şekilde planlanmış ve yeni bir açık yaratmak yerine, oradaki açığı kapatacak bir vakıf üniversitesi; elini taşın altına koymaya da hazır ticaret ve sanayi odalarımız.
Ve birçok kişi bugün değindi yani tahtası yenilenemeyen, akıllı tahtaların on yıl ömrü vardı, süre doldu, yenileme imkânı yok. Şimdi böyle okulların deterjan alınmayan, sabun alınamayan bu durumdaki okulların binalarına Atatürk'le eş boyutta Cumhurbaşkanı posteri asıldı. Şimdi, gelmiş ya da geçmiş kim olursa olsun Atatürk'le yarışa girmesi yahut yarıştırılması hâlinde o yarışı kaybetmeye mahkûm benim nazarımda. Dolayısıyla o ideolojik boyutu hiç tartışmayacağım ama şöyle bir boyutu var: Bu posterlerin okullara maliyeti ne oldu, ben bunu çok merak ediyorum. Yani sabun için, yemek için, personel için bulunamayan kaynak; okullar o kaynağı bu posterler için nasıl buldular, nasıl bir maliyetti bu, hiç bunu düşündünüz mü acaba? Çünkü dediğim gibi, diğer kısmı yani aynı zamanda bir parti genel başkanının portresinin okullara asılması, bu şuuraltını tartışmayacağım hiç çünkü yüz yıl kadar geriye gitmek gerekiyor, vakit yok ona şimdi.
Çok teşekkür ediyorum.
records.englishTranslation:
SELCAN TAŞCI (Tekirdağ) - Thank you, Mr. President.
Dear Minister, you already know the problem of Tekirdağ's schools being demolished and not rebuilt due to their lack of resistance to earthquakes, and now the deaf sultan also knows. As a city, we keep this issue nonpartisan, because there is both a social consensus and, I say this without distinguishing all parties, a political consensus; Because there is urgency to meet this need. We do not ignore the effort, especially our Governor and the bureaucrats are trying to prioritize this, we see that, but 5 schools in Süleymanpaşa, 4 schools in Marmaraereğlisi, 3 schools in Şarköy, 4 schools in Hayrabolu are still serving in adjacent, combined buildings. And this, unfortunately, brings with it academic failure, indiscipline, deepens the already existing security problem and aggravates the already existing hygiene problem. In addition to the schools planned to be built, Tekirdağ is also one of the provinces with a very rapid population increase due to immigration. This is the determination of the educators, especially in the 4 neighborhoods of Süleymanpaşa, 100. Yıl, Atatürk, Hürriyet and Zafer, they say that there is a need for 21 additional classrooms each.
Our teacher's home was evacuated and abandoned to its fate. It was also the center of the social life of the city, we are waiting for its construction. And in Muratlı, there are schools that were evacuated because they were not earthquake resistant but have not been demolished yet, and these have now started to pose a public order problem. Likewise, Muratlı Teacher Training Center is the same way. These places turn into dens of crime and evil, where children and young people take drugs and are abused. The need to compensate for the interruption of education is a separate problem here, but for the reasons I mentioned, as long as these places are not demolished, it turns into a life safety problem for children. Unfortunately, what is developing there, we always talk about, is because of the issue of involvement in crime.
Our two schools in Muratlı, namely Yavuz Sultan Selim Kindergarten and Cumhuriyet Primary School, which serve in a ninety-year-old building, are truly beyond terrible in terms of physical conditions. In Turkey in 2025, when it rains, from its base and walls, here is the western side of the country, in tax order: In such a city, such a kindergarten is neither acceptable nor tolerable. I mean, it's really a pity for the children there, because of the intense humidity there, those tiny bodies are rotting before our eyes. Again, in 2025 Turkey, a school with boiling water on the ground is Cumhuriyet Primary School, that is, 2 pumps are allocated there and water is constantly being drawn from there; This also needs to be addressed very urgently.

Now, I think that there is no point in constantly increasing the number of departments and increasing the number of departments in universities that have no output other than graduating unemployed people and producing disappointment, and that it is a political mistake and even proof of lack of policy. But now, as someone who thinks like this, I will demand a university, it may seem like a contradiction; We want a foundation university in Çorlu, but it is not at the standards I mentioned, that is, it is an industrial zone, you know, a foundation university built with the logic of industry-university cooperation, which will integrate with the regional industry with R&D studies, contribute to technological transformation, is planned in accordance with the political and production profile of the region and will close the gap there instead of creating a new deficit; Our chambers of commerce and industry are ready to take responsibility.
And many people mentioned today that smart boards have a lifespan of ten years, the boards of which cannot be renewed, the time has expired, there is no possibility of renewal. Now, a poster of the President, the same size as Atatürk, has been hung on the buildings of such schools where detergent and soap cannot be purchased. Now, in my opinion, no matter who is present or past, if they compete or are made to compete with Atatürk, they are doomed to lose that race. Therefore, I will never discuss that ideological dimension, but there is a dimension like this: I am very curious about how much these posters cost the schools. In other words, unavailable resources for soap, food, and personnel; How did schools find that resource for these posters? What was the cost? Have you ever thought about that? Because, as I said, the other part, namely the hanging of a party chairman's portrait in schools, I will not discuss this subconscious at all, because we need to go back about a hundred years, there is no time for that now.
Thank you very much.
